description: Compare all 6 OpenAI TTS voices side by side. Enter any text, generate speech for each voice, play and compare. FastAPI backend, React frontend.
features: 6 OpenAI TTS voices: Alloy, Echo, Fable, Onyx, Nova, Shimmer
Generate individual voices or all 6 in parallel
Audio playback with progress bar per voice
4 sample text presets (Narration, Announcement, Technical, Conversational)
FastAPI backend — real neural TTS, no browser quirks
Dark UI with per-voice color theming
